question: What is the relative position of the woman and the dog in the image? Select from the following options: (A) The dog is on the leash held by the woman. (B) The woman is riding the dog. (C) The dog is on the back of the horse ridden by the man and woman. (D) None of the above.
gold_answer: The dog is on the leash held by the woman
answer_choices: The dog is on the leash held by the woman
The woman is riding the dog
The dog is on the back of the horse ridden by the man and woman

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A woman riding a horse, holding a leash attached to a dog walking beside them.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The woman is not riding the dog, and the dog is not on the horse.

inpaint_prompt_used: A woman riding a horse, holding a leash attached to a dog walking beside them.
negative_prompt_used: The woman is not riding the dog, and the dog is not on the horse.
